title: gentiana helophila subsp. helophila
intro: Gentiana helophila subsp. helophila, also known as Marsh Gentian or Alpine Marsh Gentian, is a perennial plant species of the Gentianaceae family, found in wetland areas and mountainous regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gentiana helophila subsp. helophila include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing protection against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
